testcase.name: test_simple_registration_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_routes_refactored.py:64: in test_simple_registration_success assert response.status_code in [200, 201], f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: {"detail":"Mobile number must be 10 digits"} E assert 400 in [200, 201] E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_simple_registration_duplicate_email

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for duplicate email, got 520 assert 520 == 400 + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_routes_refactored.py:111: in test_simple_registration_duplicate_email assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for duplicate email, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for duplicate email, got 520 E assert 520 == 400 E + where 520 = <Response [520]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_check_auth_type_existing_user

failure.message: AssertionError: User should exist assert False == True

testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_routes_refactored.py:131: in test_check_auth_type_existing_user assert data["user_exists"] == True, "User should exist" E AssertionError: User should exist E assert False == True

testcase.name: test_login_success
testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_routes_refactored.py:161: in test_login_success assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: {"detail":"User not registered. Please register to continue."} E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_login_wrong_password

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 401 for wrong password, got 404 assert 404 == 401 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_routes_refactored.py:184: in test_login_wrong_password assert response.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401 for wrong password, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 401 for wrong password, got 404 E assert 404 == 401 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_auth_router_prefix

failure.message: AssertionError: Route /api/auth/forgot-password?email=test@test.com should exist assert 405 not in [404, 405] + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_routes_refactored.py:500: in test_auth_router_prefix assert response.status_code not in [404, 405], f"Route {endpoint} should exist" E AssertionError: Route /api/auth/forgot-password?email=test@test.com should exist E assert 405 not in [404, 405] E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code
